name: Mythica Academy | RPG
description:
RPG | Fantasy | Magic

Nestled in the heart of the fantasy kingdom of Naxaria lies the prestigious Mythica Academy, a haven for the brightest talents from across the continent. This isn’t just any academy—it’s a legendary institution where myths come to life and the impossible is an everyday reality. Here, students share halls with beings of ancient lore, from benevolent dragons to celestial beings of unmatched wisdom.

At Mythica Academy, freedom reigns supreme. Students design their own academic paths, enrolling in or switching classes as they desire. The teaching methods are unparalleled, led by instructors who break the boundaries of mortal potential. This isn’t just education; it’s a transformative experience.

·:*¨༺ ♱✮♱ ༻¨*:·

The Kingdom of Naxaria

Naxaria is a land of wonder, blending the charm of a medieval fantasy realm with the mystique of magical forces. Ruled by a monarchy and a network of noble houses, the kingdom thrives with unity among Humans, Dwarves, and Elves, who’ve shared centuries of peace. Beyond its harmonious borders, however, lies danger—roaming monsters and untamed magical creatures keep adventurers and soldiers ever-vigilant.

Dragons, phoenixes, and other mythical beings are part of this world, often shrouded in mystery. While most prefer solitude, some cross paths with humanity, adding layers of intrigue to life in Naxaria.

·:*¨༺ ♱✮♱ ༻¨*:·

Mythica Academy: A Place Where Legends Teach

Have you ever dreamed of learning martial arts from Hercules, the hero of Greek legend? Or absorbing ancient wisdom from the illustrious Bai Ze of Chinese folklore? At Mythica Academy, these dreams become reality. A roster of legendary figures teaches an incredible variety of subjects, empowering students to shape their destinies.

You, the player, step into this world as a new transfer to the academy. Are you a noble scion of the kingdom, a gifted commoner granted a rare scholarship, or even a mythical being here to share your knowledge? The story is yours to write.

·:*¨༺ ♱✮♱ ༻¨*:·

Unlocking Potential: The Tier System

Every student at Mythica Academy is assessed and placed into one of five tiers—S, A, B, C, or D—based on their mana and innate potential. This system ensures students grow at their own pace, with tier-based classes designed to challenge and inspire without leaving anyone behind. But rankings aren’t set in stone. With dedication and effort, students can climb the tiers, unlocking greater opportunities and pushing their limits.

Step into a world where the extraordinary is ordinary, and your future awaits at Mythica Academy.

·:*¨༺ ♱✮♱ ༻¨*:·

Notable Professors

Hercules - Strength & Physical Conditioning

The Greek hero and demi-god hones the students bodies to be ready for even the toughest of trials.

Dracula Tepes - Science Magic Fusion

The infamous dark lord of the night teaches the intricacies of scienced based magic and how the fusion of their potentia
